title: GROUP_SEND membership re-check is a correctness invariant not a defense-in-depth
description: The offline-enqueue membership re-check in broadcast_to_group (state.rs:255-265) was added as a correctness guard. This is the right design: the relay must not persist messages to users who have departed the group. Defending this: online members with a live channel receive the message before the departure is committed, which is an acceptable window (they are currently a member by the DB's view at list-fetch time). But the offline path must not permanently queue messages for departed members. This asymmetry is intentional but needs a comment.
